acceptanceCriteria: Given no cart exists, When the customer creates a cart with currency code EUR, Then a cart is returned with an assigned id and currency code EUR
Given no cart exists, When the customer creates a cart without a currency code, Then the command is rejected with a required-field error on currency code
Given no cart exists, When the customer creates a cart with an inline billing address and shipping address, Then the cart is returned with both addresses attached
Given no cart exists, When the customer creates a cart with an inline line item, Then the cart is returned with that line item in its items collection
Given a cart exists, When the customer updates the cart's email, Then the cart is returned with the new email
Given a cart exists, When the customer updates the cart's locale or metadata, Then the cart reflects the new header values
Given no cart with the given id exists, When the customer updates that id, Then the command is rejected with a not-found error
Given a cart exists, When the customer sets a shipping address with full address fields, Then the cart reflects that shipping address
Given a cart already has a shipping address, When the customer sets a new shipping address, Then the previous address is replaced wholesale
Given no cart with the given id exists, When the customer sets a shipping address, Then the command is rejected with a not-found error
Given a cart exists, When the customer sets a billing address with full address fields, Then the cart reflects that billing address
Given a cart already has a billing address, When the customer sets a new billing address, Then the previous address is replaced wholesale
Given no cart with the given id exists, When the customer sets a billing address, Then the command is rejected with a not-found error
Given a cart exists, When the customer adds a line item with title, quantity 1 and unit price 100, Then the cart contains exactly one line item with those values
Given a cart exists, When the customer adds several line items in one call, Then all items are present on the cart
Given a cart id that does not exist, When the customer adds a line item, Then the command is rejected with a not-found error
Given a cart exists, When the customer adds a line item missing quantity, Then the command is rejected with a required-field error on quantity
Given a line item exists, When the customer updates its title via id, Then the new title is returned
Given a line item exists, When the customer updates its quantity, Then the cart reflects the new quantity
Given several line items exist across carts, When the customer updates them via multiple selectors in one call, Then every matching line item is updated
Given a line item exists on a cart, When the customer removes it, Then the cart's items collection no longer contains that item
Given multiple line items exist on a cart, When the customer removes them all, Then the cart's items collection is empty
Given a cart has line items, When the automation sets adjustments for each line item, Then those adjustments are present
Given a cart already has a line-item adjustment, When the automation sets a different adjustment for the same line item, Then only the new adjustment remains
Given a cart has line-item adjustments, When the automation sets the adjustments to an empty list, Then all adjustments on all line items are removed
Given a cart has a line-item adjustment with id A, When the automation sets adjustments containing id A with changed fields, Then the adjustment with id A is updated in place
Given an adjustment is targeted at a line item not belonging to the cart, When the automation sets it, Then the command is rejected with an invalid-data error
Given a cart has line items, When the automation sets tax lines per item with code and rate, Then those tax lines are present
Given a cart has a line-item tax line, When the automation sets a different tax line for the same item, Then only the new one remains
Given a cart has line-item tax lines, When the automation sets them to empty, Then all are removed

Given a cart has two tax lines on one item, When the automation sets a list with one updated existing id and one brand-new tax line, Then the updated line is updated, the new line is created, and the omitted line is removed
Given a cart exists, When the customer adds a shipping method with name and amount 100, Then the method appears on the cart
Given a cart exists, When the customer adds a shipping method with a negative amount, Then the command is rejected due to a check-constraint violation
Given two carts exist, When the customer adds a shipping method to each in one call, Then each cart receives its method
Given a cart has shipping methods, When the automation sets adjustments for each shipping method, Then those adjustments are present
Given a cart has a shipping-method adjustment, When the automation sets a different adjustment for the same shipping method, Then only the new one remains
Given a cart has shipping-method adjustments, When the automation sets them to empty, Then all are removed

Given a shipping method belongs to cart A, When the automation tries to add an adjustment for that method against cart B, Then the command is rejected because the shipping method does not belong to cart B
Given a cart has shipping methods, When the automation sets tax lines per method, Then those tax lines are present
Given a cart has a shipping tax line, When the automation sets a different tax line for the same method, Then only the new one remains
Given a cart has shipping tax lines, When the automation sets them to empty, Then all are removed

Given a cart has two shipping tax lines on one method, When the automation sets a list with one updated existing id and one new line, Then the updated line is updated, the new line is created, and the omitted line is removed
Given a cart has a shipping method, When the customer removes it, Then the cart has no shipping methods
Given a cart has multiple shipping methods, When the customer removes one by id, Then only the targeted method is soft-deleted
Given a cart exists, When the automation adds a credit line with a positive amount and reference to a refund, Then the credit line appears on the cart
Given a cart exists, When the automation adds a credit line with a negative amount as a surcharge, Then the credit line appears on the cart with the negative amount
Given no cart with the given id exists, When the automation adds a credit line, Then the command is rejected with a not-found error
Given a cart has a credit line, When the automation removes it, Then the cart no longer reflects that credit line
Given a cart has multiple credit lines, When the automation removes one by id, Then only that credit line is soft-deleted
Given a cart exists, When the customer deletes it, Then it is no longer listed for that id
Given a cart exists with line items and shipping methods, When the customer deletes it, Then the cart and its child collections are soft-deleted
Given a cart has been soft-deleted, When the admin restores it, Then the cart is listed again under its id
Given a cart with soft-deleted line items and shipping methods, When the admin restores the cart, Then the cart and its previously soft-deleted children are restored

Cart.description: Aggregate root that represents a customer's shopping cart in a single currency, scoped to a region and sales channel. Holds purchasable items, shipping selections, and pricing artefacts until the cart is abandoned, soft-deleted, or converted to an order.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the cart.

fields.name: currencyCode
fields.description: ISO-4217 currency code, normalised to lower-case and fixed at creation.

fields.name: regionId
fields.description: External reference to the Region aggregate the cart is scoped to.

fields.name: customerId
fields.description: External reference to the owning Customer; null for anonymous carts.

fields.name: salesChannelId
fields.description: External reference to the Sales Channel through which the cart is being created.

fields.name: email
fields.description: Email address of the buyer for communications and order receipts.

fields.name: locale
fields.description: BCP-47 language tag indicating the buyer's preferred language.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Free-form integration data attached to the cart.

fields.name: completedAt
fields.description: Marker timestamp set by external order-creation when the cart becomes an order.

fields.name: billingAddress
fields.description: Postal address used for billing; replaced wholesale.

fields.name: shippingAddress
fields.description: Postal address used for shipping; replaced wholesale.

fields.name: lineItems
fields.description: Purchasable items currently in the cart.

fields.name: shippingMethods
fields.description: Shipping options selected for the cart.

fields.name: creditLines
fields.description: Monetary credits or surcharges applied to the cart.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the cart was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp of the last modification to the cart.

fields.name: deletedAt
fields.description: Timestamp set when the cart is soft-deleted; null while active.

LineItem.description: Related entity representing a purchasable item added to a cart, carrying a snapshot of product/variant attributes captured at add-time so later catalogue changes do not mutate the cart.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the line item.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Display title of the item shown to the buyer.

fields.name: quantity
fields.description: Number of units purchased; must be greater than zero.

fields.name: unitPrice
fields.description: Price per unit at the moment the line item was added or updated.

fields.name: subtitle
fields.description: Optional secondary display text for the line item.

fields.name: thumbnail
fields.description: URL of an image representing the item.

fields.name: variantId
fields.description: External reference to the Product variant snapshot.

fields.name: productId
fields.description: External reference to the Product snapshot.

fields.name: productTitle
fields.description: Snapshot of the product title taken from the catalogue.

fields.name: productDescription
fields.description: Snapshot of the product description from the catalogue.

fields.name: productSubtitle
fields.description: Snapshot of the product subtitle.

fields.name: productType
fields.description: Snapshot of the product type label.

fields.name: productTypeId
fields.description: External reference to the product type aggregate.

fields.name: productCollection
fields.description: Snapshot of the product collection it belongs to.

fields.name: productHandle
fields.description: Snapshot of the SEO-friendly product handle.

fields.name: variantSku
fields.description: Snapshot of the variant SKU code.

fields.name: variantBarcode
fields.description: Snapshot of the variant barcode.

fields.name: variantTitle
fields.description: Snapshot of the variant title.

fields.name: variantOptionValues
fields.description: Snapshot of variant option values such as size or color.

fields.name: requiresShipping
fields.description: Whether shipping needs to be applied for this item.

fields.name: isDiscountable
fields.description: Whether the item is eligible for promotional discounts.

fields.name: isGiftcard
fields.description: Whether the item is a gift card line.

fields.name: isTaxInclusive
fields.description: Whether the unit price already includes tax.

fields.name: isCustomPrice
fields.description: Whether the price was set manually rather than from the catalogue.

fields.name: compareAtUnitPrice
fields.description: Original list price used for strike-through display.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Free-form integration data for the line item.

fields.name: adjustments
fields.description: Discount adjustments applied to this line item.

fields.name: taxLines
fields.description: Tax charges applied to this line item.

ShippingMethod.description: Related entity representing a shipping option selected for the cart with its own amount, adjustments, and tax lines. Lifecycle is tied to the cart and managed via add/remove commands.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the shipping method on the cart.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Display name of the shipping method.

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Cost of the shipping method; must be non-negative.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Provider-specific descriptive payload for the shipping method.

fields.name: shippingOptionId
fields.description: External reference to the Fulfillment Shipping Option.

fields.name: data
fields.description: Provider-specific metadata such as carrier payload.

fields.name: isTaxInclusive
fields.description: Whether the shipping amount already includes tax.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Free-form integration data for the shipping method.

fields.name: adjustments
fields.description: Discount adjustments applied to this shipping method.

fields.name: taxLines
fields.description: Tax charges applied to this shipping method.

CreditLine.description: Related entity representing a monetary credit or surcharge applied to the cart, typically referencing an external refund or store credit. Has its own add/soft-delete lifecycle within the cart.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the credit line.

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Credit amount; positive credits the cart, negative is a surcharge.

fields.name: reference
fields.description: Name of the external aggregate type the credit references.

fields.name: referenceId
fields.description: Identifier in the referenced external aggregate.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Free-form integration data for the credit line.

Address.description: Value object representing a postal/contact address attached to a cart for billing or shipping. Immutable and replaced as a whole when the address is updated.

fields.name: firstName
fields.description: First name of the addressee.

fields.name: lastName
fields.description: Last name of the addressee.

fields.name: company
fields.description: Company name associated with the address, if any.

fields.name: address1
fields.description: Primary street address line.

fields.name: address2
fields.description: Secondary address line such as apartment or suite number.

fields.name: city
fields.description: City or locality of the address.

fields.name: province
fields.description: State, province, or region of the address.

fields.name: postalCode
fields.description: Postal or ZIP code of the address.

fields.name: countryCode
fields.description: ISO-3166 alpha-2 country code of the address.

fields.name: phone
fields.description: Phone number associated with the address for delivery contact.

fields.name: customerId
fields.description: External reference to the Customer this address belongs to.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Free-form integration data attached to the address.

LineItemAdjustment.description: Value object representing a discount applied to a single line item, originating from a promotion or manual override. Replaced as a whole set; individual adjustments are not patched.

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Discount amount applied to the line item; must be non-negative.

fields.name: code
fields.description: Promotion code or human label associated with the adjustment.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable description of the adjustment.

fields.name: promotionId
fields.description: External reference to the Promotion that produced this adjustment.

fields.name: providerId
fields.description: Identifier of the system or rule engine that computed the adjustment.

fields.name: isTaxInclusive
fields.description: Whether the adjustment amount is inclusive of tax.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Free-form integration data for the adjustment.

LineItemTaxLine.description: Value object representing a tax charge applied to a line item. Replaced as a whole set when the tax workflow recomputes taxes for the cart.

fields.name: code
fields.description: Tax code identifying the type of tax applied.

fields.name: rate
fields.description: Tax rate expressed as a percentage (e.g., 20 for 20%).

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable description of the tax line.

fields.name: providerId
fields.description: Identifier of the tax provider or engine that computed the line.

fields.name: taxRateId
fields.description: External reference to the configured Tax Rate aggregate.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Free-form integration data for the tax line.

ShippingMethodAdjustment.description: Value object representing a discount applied to a shipping method on the cart. Replaced as a whole set rather than patched individually.

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Discount amount applied to the shipping method; must be non-negative.

fields.name: code
fields.description: Promotion code or label associated with the adjustment.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable description of the shipping discount.

fields.name: promotionId
fields.description: External reference to the Promotion that produced this adjustment.

fields.name: providerId
fields.description: Identifier of the system that computed the adjustment.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Free-form integration data for the adjustment.

ShippingMethodTaxLine.description: Value object representing a tax charge applied to a shipping method on the cart. Replaced as a whole set when taxes are recomputed.

fields.name: code
fields.description: Tax code identifying the type of tax applied to shipping.

fields.name: rate
fields.description: Tax rate as a percentage applied to the shipping amount.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable description of the shipping tax line.

fields.name: providerId
fields.description: Identifier of the tax provider that computed the line.

fields.name: taxRateId
fields.description: External reference to the configured Tax Rate aggregate.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Free-form integration data for the tax line.
